channel.title: The Morning Lift
channel.description: Four positive stories in four minutes. Free audio, waiting for you when you wake up. Every morning, The Morning Lift brings you four uplifting, true stories — science, progress, kindness, and quiet wonder — to start your day on the right note.
channel.itunes:summary: Four positive stories in four minutes. Free audio, waiting for you when you wake up. Every morning, The Morning Lift brings you four uplifting, true stories — science, progress, kindness, and quiet wonder — to start your day on the right note.
channel.itunes:author: The Morning Lift

item.title: The Morning Lift — Monday, June 29, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Sunday, June 28, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) HPV vaccine has "almost eliminated" cervical cancer in young women; (2) India halved its smoking rate this century; (3) Reintroduced beavers solved chronic flooding in west London; (4) Chilangas FC: blind women's football transforming lives in Mexico.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) HPV vaccine has "almost eliminated" cervical cancer in young women; (2) India halved its smoking rate this century; (3) Reintroduced beavers solved chronic flooding in west London; (4) Chilangas FC: blind women's football transforming lives in Mexico.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Saturday, June 27, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Friday, June 26, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Thursday, June 25, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Cape Verde's undefeated World Cup debut; (2) Humpback whale super-groups off Antarctica; (3) AI-designed rare-earth-free magnets; (4) UN marks 20 years of disability-rights law.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Cape Verde's undefeated World Cup debut; (2) Humpback whale super-groups off Antarctica; (3) AI-designed rare-earth-free magnets; (4) UN marks 20 years of disability-rights law.

item.title: Mid Week Lift — Wednesday, June 24, 2026
item.description: A midweek bonus from The Morning Lift: “NASA fires up most powerful electric thruster ever tested in the US — a step toward crewed Mars” — one of our most-loved stories, re-read for you. Originally from our May 14 episode. Hear a new lift every morning at themorninglift.org.
item.itunes:summary: A midweek bonus from The Morning Lift: “NASA fires up most powerful electric thruster ever tested in the US — a step toward crewed Mars” — one of our most-loved stories, re-read for you. Originally from our May 14 episode. Hear a new lift every morning at themorninglift.org.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Wednesday, June 24, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Tuesday, June 23, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Monday, June 22, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Kyrgyzstan formalizes a "climate-ready" wildlife corridor for snow leopards; (2) The Smithsonian's Arts and Industries Building reopens after 22 years; (3) Researchers 3D-print architectural panels from yeast; (4) Workforce Pell — biggest federal college-aid expansion in 50 years — launches.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Kyrgyzstan formalizes a "climate-ready" wildlife corridor for snow leopards; (2) The Smithsonian's Arts and Industries Building reopens after 22 years; (3) Researchers 3D-print architectural panels from yeast; (4) Workforce Pell — biggest federal college-aid expansion in 50 years — launches.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Sunday, June 21, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Saturday, June 20, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Friday, June 19, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) A real weakness found in PFAS "forever chemicals"; (2) A fixable cause of fading cellular energy; (3) A durable middle path for knee osteoarthritis; (4) Housing built over a food pantry and a bus.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) A real weakness found in PFAS "forever chemicals"; (2) A fixable cause of fading cellular energy; (3) A durable middle path for knee osteoarthritis; (4) Housing built over a food pantry and a bus.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Thursday, June 18, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Messi scores his first-ever World Cup hat trick in his sixth World Cup; (2) A once-a-day pill nearly doubles survival in pancreatic cancer; (3) Two Kenyan teens turn farm waste into a working car-exhaust filter; (4) Cahokia Mounds museum reopens after four-plus years.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Messi scores his first-ever World Cup hat trick in his sixth World Cup; (2) A once-a-day pill nearly doubles survival in pancreatic cancer; (3) Two Kenyan teens turn farm waste into a working car-exhaust filter; (4) Cahokia Mounds museum reopens after four-plus years.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Wednesday, June 17, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Tuesday, June 16, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Children's reading-for-pleasure rises for the first time since 2021; (2) JUNO neutrino observatory publishes its first physics result; (3) Global mangrove forests rebound — net decline reversing; (4) Angkor Thom's 800-year-old water system uncovered — and slated for restoration.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Children's reading-for-pleasure rises for the first time since 2021; (2) JUNO neutrino observatory publishes its first physics result; (3) Global mangrove forests rebound — net decline reversing; (4) Angkor Thom's 800-year-old water system uncovered — and slated for restoration.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Monday, June 15, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Sunday, June 14, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) LEAD; (2) Tribeca Festival's record-breaking 25th edition closes; (3) Stanford blocks a "gerozyme" and regrows knee cartilage; (4) 30-year study: ~90–120 min/week of strength training is the high-value zone.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) LEAD; (2) Tribeca Festival's record-breaking 25th edition closes; (3) Stanford blocks a "gerozyme" and regrows knee cartilage; (4) 30-year study: ~90–120 min/week of strength training is the high-value zone.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Saturday, June 13, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) A power company replanted nearly half a million trees — and 91% survived; (2) For the first full month on record, U.S. solar out-produced coal; (3) A teenager won UK Young Engineer of the Year for a medical-delivery drone; (4) NASA's Roman telescope may launch early — and could find 100,000 new worlds.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) A power company replanted nearly half a million trees — and 91% survived; (2) For the first full month on record, U.S. solar out-produced coal; (3) A teenager won UK Young Engineer of the Year for a medical-delivery drone; (4) NASA's Roman telescope may launch early — and could find 100,000 new worlds.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Friday, June 12, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) LEAD; (2) Innovation/Aerospace; (3) Community/Housing (underused-category anchor); (4) Health/Endocrinology.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) LEAD; (2) Innovation/Aerospace; (3) Community/Housing (underused-category anchor); (4) Health/Endocrinology.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Thursday, June 11, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Sudan & South Sudan eliminate maternal & neonatal tetanus; (2) Wheelchair half-marathon records in Chicago (Romanchuk & McFadden); (3) EXCAP home-exercise program reduces "chemo brain"; (4) 40-million-year-old ant revealed in Goethe's amber via synchrotron CT.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Sudan & South Sudan eliminate maternal & neonatal tetanus; (2) Wheelchair half-marathon records in Chicago (Romanchuk & McFadden); (3) EXCAP home-exercise program reduces "chemo brain"; (4) 40-million-year-old ant revealed in Goethe's amber via synchrotron CT.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Wednesday, June 10, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Science / Materials — Cobalt's hidden topological states; (2) Environment / Conservation; (3) Sports / Soccer; (4) Innovation / Clean Transport — China's electric heavy trucks tip.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Science / Materials — Cobalt's hidden topological states; (2) Environment / Conservation; (3) Sports / Soccer; (4) Innovation / Clean Transport — China's electric heavy trucks tip.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Tuesday, June 9, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) AI-designed universal coronavirus vaccine clears first human trial; (2) Low-temperature hydrogen catalyst cuts cost; (3) "House Made of Dawn" — largest Native American art survey at the New-York Historical; (4) Three Stanley Cup Final records in one game.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) AI-designed universal coronavirus vaccine clears first human trial; (2) Low-temperature hydrogen catalyst cuts cost; (3) "House Made of Dawn" — largest Native American art survey at the New-York Historical; (4) Three Stanley Cup Final records in one game.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Monday, June 8, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Ocean protection crosses 10%; (2) Europe's largest 3D-printed affordable apartment building; (3) LEGO Foundation pledges $97M to the IRC for kids in conflict zones; (4) Two molecules repaired nerve damage in MS models.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Ocean protection crosses 10%; (2) Europe's largest 3D-printed affordable apartment building; (3) LEGO Foundation pledges $97M to the IRC for kids in conflict zones; (4) Two molecules repaired nerve damage in MS models.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Sunday, June 7, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Octopuses use mirrors to find food they can't see; (2) Europe sets a new dam-removal record; (3) Roman bridge found in the Aare riverbed; (4) Mirra Andreeva wins the French Open.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Octopuses use mirrors to find food they can't see; (2) Europe sets a new dam-removal record; (3) Roman bridge found in the Aare riverbed; (4) Mirra Andreeva wins the French Open.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Saturday, June 6, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Culture/Arts — "Another Wonderland": rescued WPA Alice murals open at MCNY; (2) Community/Food Access — MLK Center opens North End satellite food pantry, Newport RI; (3) Health/Ophthalmology; (4) Innovation/Photonics.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Culture/Arts — "Another Wonderland": rescued WPA Alice murals open at MCNY; (2) Community/Food Access — MLK Center opens North End satellite food pantry, Newport RI; (3) Health/Ophthalmology; (4) Innovation/Photonics.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Friday, June 5, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) First evidence of magnetic fields on exoplanets; (2) 5,500-year-old high-altitude copper-working cave, Pyrenees; (3) Goya's San Antonio de la Florida frescoes restored, Madrid; (4) Amivantamab shrinks advanced head & neck cancer (OrigAMI-4).
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) First evidence of magnetic fields on exoplanets; (2) 5,500-year-old high-altitude copper-working cave, Pyrenees; (3) Goya's San Antonio de la Florida frescoes restored, Madrid; (4) Amivantamab shrinks advanced head & neck cancer (OrigAMI-4).

item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Sunday, May 31, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Saturn's rotation puzzle solved by JWST (Science/Planetary); (2) Anacostia Community Museum opens "We Make History" with the Plummer family diary at its center (Community/Heritage); (3) Platypuses breeding again in Australia's Hacking River after 50+ year absence (Environment/Conservation); (4) England's first Dutch-style "fietsstraat" cycle street opens in Cambridge (Innovation/Urban).
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Saturn's rotation puzzle solved by JWST (Science/Planetary); (2) Anacostia Community Museum opens "We Make History" with the Plummer family diary at its center (Community/Heritage); (3) Platypuses breeding again in Australia's Hacking River after 50+ year absence (Environment/Conservation); (4) England's first Dutch-style "fietsstraat" cycle street opens in Cambridge (Innovation/Urban).

item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Monday, May 25, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) LEAD — Health/Public Health: Tunisia eliminates trachoma; (2) Innovation/Accessibility: Assistive AI crosses into daily life; (3) Community/Education: Chicago Class of 2026 leaves with college underway; (4) Culture/Heritage: Oldest English poem found in a Roman library.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) LEAD — Health/Public Health: Tunisia eliminates trachoma; (2) Innovation/Accessibility: Assistive AI crosses into daily life; (3) Community/Education: Chicago Class of 2026 leaves with college underway; (4) Culture/Heritage: Oldest English poem found in a Roman library.

item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Sunday, May 17, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Malaria vaccine averts 1 in 8 child deaths across Ghana, Kenya, and Malawi; (2) Record 30,000 coho salmon return to California's Mendocino coast; first naturally reproducing coho in upper Russian River basin in 30+ years; (3) Deep canyons off Western Australia reveal hidden marine ecosystem, including first concrete signs of giant squid in those waters; (4) Cumberland, BC repurposing abandoned coal-mine groundwater for geothermal heating and cooling.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Malaria vaccine averts 1 in 8 child deaths across Ghana, Kenya, and Malawi; (2) Record 30,000 coho salmon return to California's Mendocino coast; first naturally reproducing coho in upper Russian River basin in 30+ years; (3) Deep canyons off Western Australia reveal hidden marine ecosystem, including first concrete signs of giant squid in those waters; (4) Cumberland, BC repurposing abandoned coal-mine groundwater for geothermal heating and cooling.

item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Wednesday, May 6, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Cherie DeVaux becomes first female trainer to win the Kentucky Derby; (2) JAMA study links 988 crisis-line launch to ~11% drop in young-adult suicide deaths; (3) Malawian innovator wins ICT Award for AI eye-control system for motor disabilities; (4) Yangtze River fish biomass doubles after sweeping 2021 fishing ban.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning: (1) Cherie DeVaux becomes first female trainer to win the Kentucky Derby; (2) JAMA study links 988 crisis-line launch to ~11% drop in young-adult suicide deaths; (3) Malawian innovator wins ICT Award for AI eye-control system for motor disabilities; (4) Yangtze River fish biomass doubles after sweeping 2021 fishing ban.

item.title: The Morning Lift — Sunday, April 19, 2026
item.description: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
item.itunes:summary: Four positive stories to start your morning — science, progress, kindness, and wonder. Free audio, about five minutes.
